accommodations.text: Allow text-to-speech for grade-level reading passages.

accommodations.text: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on classroom assessments.
Repeat and rephrase spoken directions on request.

Specialized academic instruction 30 minutes 5 times weekly
